title: Grand Design
description: Grand Design is mod for use in Creative Mode for making modern architecture.
body:
Grand Design is mod for use in Creative Mode for making modern architecture.

Grand Design is a mod for Forge 1.20.1

It has many blocks and elements with architectural features including:

WALLS
Blockwork, Bricks, Cob, Concrete, Flint, Marble, OSB, Render, Stone, Stucco and Tiles. There are also Brutalist Blocks for Brutalist architectre and sculptures. There are also a selection of Half Blocks. Some blocks can be turned for different textures.

FLOORING
Concrete, Cork, Marble and Tile. Some floor blocks can be turned for different textures.

CLADDING

Cladding are thin sheets that can be applied to blocks for external textures and materials including:
Copper, Corrugated Iron, Corten Steel, Japanese Shou Sugi Ban, many Wood types and Zinc.

ROOFING
Corrugated Iron, Shingle, Slate, Terracotta Tile, Thatch and Zinc.

ASSD
Fences, Flashing, Grasses and Sedum for roofs, Glulam, Gutters, Slabs, Spiral Staircase, Stilt Poles, Verandah Sheet, Stone Fireplaces and working Solar Panels for flat roofs and angled (stair) roofs.

LIGHTING
Ceiling lights, Wall Lights and a Light Switch.

FENESTRATION
Various Doors and Windows.

CONTAINER
Container elements including Container Doors, Roof, Walls and Windows and a Skylight.
